instruction: Fix the remaining Phase 1 foundation issues only. Do not start Phase 2 yet.

workspace.status: Most earlier findings were fixed, but auth wiring still has compile-level inconsistencies.

review_findings.issue: main.dart constructs ApiClient with the wrong dependency type.
details: main.dart currently does: final apiClient = ApiClient(authService);
But ApiClient now expects AuthProvider, not AuthService.

review_findings.issue: ApiClient calls a method that AuthProvider does not implement.
details: ApiClient calls _authProvider.getToken(), but AuthProvider has no getToken() method.
This is still a compile blocker.

review_findings.issue: Auth dependency ownership is still muddled between AuthService and AuthProvider.
details: Decide clearly where token access belongs.
Either ApiClient should depend on AuthService for token reads and get a logout callback, or AuthProvider should expose a safe token accessor and own logout behavior consistently.
Right now the code mixes both patterns.

required_fix.goal: Make auth wiring compile cleanly and be internally consistent.
requirements: Choose one ownership model and apply it consistently.
If ApiClient depends on AuthProvider, add the required token accessor to AuthProvider and instantiate ApiClient with authProvider in main.dart.
If ApiClient depends on AuthService instead, then remove AuthProvider-specific calls from ApiClient and provide a clean way to trigger logout UI updates on 401.
Keep the previously fixed auth restoration behavior intact.
Do not regress the corrected DTOs for generators/vendors.

preferred_solution.approach: Prefer keeping AuthProvider as the UI-facing owner and ApiClient as a thin network client.
steps: Instantiate ApiClient with authProvider in main.dart.
Expose a Future<String?> token accessor from AuthProvider that delegates to AuthService.
Keep logout in AuthProvider so 401 handling can update UI state.

acceptance_criteria: main.dart, ApiClient, AuthProvider, and AuthService compile together without type mismatches.
ApiClient no longer calls nonexistent methods.
The app still restores auth from persisted token plus user data.
401 handling still transitions the app back to unauthenticated state.
No unrelated Phase 2 work is introduced.

after_completion: Explain which compile issue each change resolves.
State whether Phase 1 is now fully complete.
